characters.name: PIPI
characters.description: Väike hall hiir roosade kõrvade ja ninaotsaga, seljas väike sinine vest. Tal on suured säravad uudishimulikud silmad ja sõbralik naeratav nägu. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: KIKI
characters.description: Väike erkroheline konn suurte ümarate silmadega, seljas väike kollane lips. Tal on rõõmus ja energiline ilme, suur naeratus. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Metsaoja ääres
locations.description: A gentle forest scene with tall green pine trees and deciduous trees with light green spring leaves. A narrow, shallow stream with clear water and smooth round river stones runs through the middle of the path. Soft green moss covers some ground areas. Bright spring sunlight filters through the tree canopy. The overall atmosphere is peaceful and natural. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are standing on a soft mossy forest path. Tall green pine trees and trees with light green spring leaves are visible around them. Bright spring sunlight filters through the tree canopy. Pipi is looking around curiously, and Kiki is smiling brightly. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are standing at the edge of a narrow, shallow stream with clear water and smooth round river stones. They both look at the stream with curious expressions. The forest setting remains the same, with trees and sunlight. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are standing by the stream. Pipi points across the stream with a paw, looking determined. Kiki nods eagerly beside Pipi, also looking at the other side. The stream runs through the forest path. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are now searching on the ground near the stream. Pipi is bending down, carefully examining a long twig on the mossy ground. Kiki is looking under a small leaf. The forest is bright with spring sunlight. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are excitedly looking at a pile of smooth, colourful river stones they have gathered near the stream. Pipi is holding a small, flat stone in its paw, and Kiki is pointing at a particularly shiny one. The forest setting is consistent. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are actively working together to build a small bridge over the narrow stream. They are carefully placing the long sticks and flat stones they collected. Pipi is pushing a stick into place, and Kiki is arranging stones. They are focused and collaborating. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, stand proudly beside their newly built small bridge. The bridge is made of several sticks laid across the stream, with flat stones placed on top. Both characters are smiling, looking at their creation with satisfaction. The stream flows gently under the bridge. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are carefully walking across their newly built small bridge. Pipi is leading, taking a small step, and Kiki is following closely behind. They both look happy and confident as they cross the stream. The forest environment is consistent. Cartoon style.

Pipi, a small grey mouse, and Kiki, a small bright green frog, are now standing on the other side of the stream, having successfully crossed the bridge. They are holding hands (or paws/webbed foot) and jumping slightly with joy, their faces beaming with big smiles. The small bridge is visible behind them, spanning the stream. Cartoon style.
